Petition To Determine Validity Of 2022 Amendment To Trust, For Financial Elder Abuse, And For Enhanced, Multiple, And Exemplary Damages Pusuant To Prob. Code 259, 850, 859
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Validity Of 2022 Amendment To Trust, For Financial Elder Abuse, And For Enhanced, Multiple, And Exemplary Damages Pusuant To Prob. Code 259, 850, 859
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Continued To Jan-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of 2022 Amendment To Trust, For Financial Elder Abuse, And For Enhanced, Multiple, And Exemplary Damages Pusuant To Prob. Code 259, 850, 859
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Continued To Sep-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Ryan Meckfessel, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for and with Raymond de la Cruz, via Zoom videoconference, Petitioner.

Ciaran O'Sullivan, personal appearance, for Ricardo Neill, Objector/Trustee.

At the outset, the issue of venue is discussed. Mr. O'Sullivan reports that he consents as to venue to keep this matter in San Francisco and waives any notice issues thereon. At the court's query, Mr. Meckfessel reports that the Trust property located on 33rd Avenue has been sold and that there will not be any distribution of the proceeds until this matter is resolved. Mr. Meckfessell reports that he can file an amendment to the petition once assets are confirmed. The issue of Notice to all intestate heirs and service to Melinda de la Cruz. Mr. O'Sullivan believes that all parties entitled to service have been properly served but advises that he'll need to confirm the preceding. There is discussion regarding settlement efforts. Mr. O'Sullivan advises that settlement discussions would be premature at this time as the parties are still working on Discovery. Mr. O'Sullivan suggests a continuance of 120 days to allow the parties time to complete Discovery and to meet and confer regarding settlement. Mr. Meckfessel agrees with Mr. O'Sullivan's suggestion.

A continuance date is discussed and confirmed. This matter is continued to Sep-09-2025 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Counsel is instructed to file a joint status report by Sep-02-2025.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Thompson. Not Reported.
